architecture_candidates.notes: Modality-specific frontends may require additional runbooks.
Streaming variants should also use the streaming-speech runbook.

evidence: config keys: num_hidden_layers, num_attention_heads, hidden_size, vocab_size
architecture_candidates.notes: Route models with routed experts, recurrent state, or multimodal projectors to a more specific family.

architecture_candidates.state: codec convolution/transformer state and optional streaming overlap
architecture_candidates.notes: Vocos/BigVGAN-only checkpoints route to the vocoder family.

architecture_candidates.state: chunk/overlap state; usually offline full-context model

limitations: Static inspection does not prove model behavior or license compatibility.
Parameter totals may double-count tied tensors and omit non-safetensors weights.
Remote metadata-only inspection cannot see tensor keys without downloading weights.
